message:
feat(server,db): expand MCP server capabilities, refactor TUI poller, and improve DB pool management

Major server expansion with improved tool handling, streamlined TUI
polling, and enhanced database connection pool management.

Server (mcp-agent-mail-server):
- lib.rs: +474 lines — expand server capabilities with additional tool
  handlers, improved request routing, and enhanced error reporting
- integrity_guard.rs: improve integrity checking and validation
- tui_poller.rs: refactor polling logic, reduce complexity (-81 lines)
- tui_app.rs, tui_events.rs: event handling improvements
- tui_screens: minor updates across attachments, explorer, messages,
  reservations, search, and threads screens
- tool_metrics.rs: metrics collection improvements
- mail_ui.rs: UI rendering update

Database:
- pool.rs: +70 lines — improve connection pool management with better
  lifecycle handling and connection reuse

CLI & main:
- cli/lib.rs: CLI interface improvements
- main.rs: +24 lines — startup and configuration improvements

Config:
- Update cursor.mcp.json and gemini.mcp.json MCP configurations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
